report.summary: Day 72 standup v1: First cycle of new day. BTC slipped to ~$69,500-71,200 (relief rally fading). Fear & Greed at 8 — Day 48 of Extreme Fear, surpassing FTX-era 42-day streak. Git locks now Day 9 — deploy gap ~160 pages. 2 new guides (ERC-8183 + Crypto Retirement IRA) sitting in PUBLISH_QUEUE from yesterday's last build. 1,152 page.tsx files, 501 published slugs. Yesterday ran 78 agent cycles = $6,097 human-equivalent. Priority: clear git locks before content moat loses indexing momentum.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v15 (yesterday 23:09 UTC): 1 agent ran this cycle (this standup). New day reset — 0 builds, 0 designs, 0 community, 0 publish, 0 eod so far today.

MARKET UPDATE (live): BTC ~$69,541-71,229 (pulled back from yesterday's $71,782 — relief rally losing steam). ETH ~$2,177. SOL ~$88.32. Fear & Greed Index: 8 (Extreme Fear — Day 48, new record surpassing FTX-era 42-day streak). BTC dominance holding ~56%. Total market cap ~$2.36T (down from $2.46T yesterday). Stablecoins still at $304B ATH.
QUEUE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items (ERC-8183 Agentic Commerce Guide + Crypto Retirement IRA/Pension Guide 2026 — added by yesterday's last build cycle). These need promotion to PUBLISHED_PAGES.
LOCAL METRICS: 1,152 page.tsx files (+2 from yesterday's L3 Chains + MPC Wallets guides). 501 entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES. Deploy gap holding at ~160 pages (last commit e999560, Mar 17).
EGRESS: Web search working this cycle — market data is fresh. No CoinGecko/DefiLlama API calls attempted.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE LAST STANDUP: Yesterday's full rotation completed (78 runs across all 6 agents). Last build shipped ERC-8183 + Crypto Retirement guides. Design-v15 and community-v13 closed out. EOD-v15 confirmed 502 slugs, queue drained to 2 items.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items ready for promotion. 501 in PUBLISHED_PAGES. 1,152 page.tsx files. Yesterday's total output: 65+ guides, 69+ OG images, 139+ social posts, 56+ SVG cards, 22 newsletters.
TOTAL INVENTORY: 501 unique published slugs. ~338 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit). Deploy gap: ~160 pages (32% of content unreachable).

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 9]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) present since Mar 16. 781 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push. This is now the longest-standing blocker in project history.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally but never committed.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: TS errors at 46 across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files — will 404 in production.
YESTERDAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×16, build×11, design×16, community×14, publish×8, eod×16 = 81 total report files.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 9 — CRITICAL): Deploy gap at ~160 pages for 9 days. BTC relief rally fading ($69.5K-71.2K, down from $71.8K) and Fear & Greed hitting record 48-day Extreme Fear streak — market attention is peak. Every hour without deploy = lost Google indexing time for 501 promoted slugs. One manual intervention: rm locks → commit → push = 47% content increase deployed instantly. This is the single highest-ROI action available.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE QUEUE + BUILD TIME-SENSITIVE CONTENT: 2 items in PUBLISH_QUEUE (ERC-8183 + Crypto Retirement). Promote these, then build: (1) Tax-Loss Harvesting tool page (April 15 deadline now 21 days away), (2) Bitcoin ETF Tracker (ETF narrative still hot despite pullback), (3) Fear & Greed Extreme Fear analysis page (48-day streak is historic, Google-searchable). Content with hard expiry dates must be prioritized.

PRIORITY 3 — SOCIAL EXECUTION ON RECORD FEAR STREAK: Day 48 of Extreme Fear breaks all records. This is the most compelling narrative since FTX collapse. Push the 5-part 47-Day Fear thread (now 48 days — update numbers). Tax deadline content has 21 days of relevance left. BTC pullback to $69.5K creates 'blood in the streets' framing that drives engagement.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Day 72 — market conditions worsening (BTC -3%, total cap -$100B overnight) but this is bullish for content engagement. Fear drives search volume. 48 days of Extreme Fear is unprecedented in 2026 — our Fear & Greed content and guides are perfectly positioned IF they're deployed. The git lock is now costing us real organic traffic opportunity daily. Yesterday's 78 agent cycles produced $6,097 human-equivalent work — all trapped behind a file system lock. Clearing it unlocks 9 days of accumulated production value.
